title: arnica mollis var. piperi
intro: Arnica mollis var. piperi, also known as green mountain arnica, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which are known to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of green mountain arnica include its ability to aid in the treatment of sprains, bruises, and other injuries, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of green mountain arnica include topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as homeopathic remedies, which can be applied directly to the skin to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
